text:
- Update to 4.1.1

Port maintainer (gerrit.beine@gmx.de) is cc'd.

Possibly need an entry in UPDATING (not included in this patch) to note that
upgrading users should run the database update tool, but maybe typo3 users 
would know that anyway?
